title: Help Desk (Retiree with IT Services) - Steps to take before your access to Microsoft 365, Google, Zoom, Box, and Qualtrics changes
body: Why is my access changing? Your affiliation type determines how your access to affected IT services will change when you leave the University. Please see the chart below to learn more. University Affiliation Type Reason for Affiliation Type Access to OFFICE 365 Access to GOOGLE Access to ZOOM Access to BOX Access to QUALTRICS Retiree with IT services* HR updated your status from former employee to retiree with IT services Reduced to email, calendar, contacts, and tasks only - Lose access to all other web and desktop apps Continues Lose access Continues Continues *Retirees are not automatically granted continued access to campus IT services and will need to apply to retain access. Contact your HR department to learn more. Note : If your HR department does not update their records to indicate you have either emeritus status or retiree with IT services status, you will lose access to the affected services listed above. When will I lose access? View the service-based deactivation timeline to see when your access will change. What should I do next? Step 1 : You are encouraged to classify data that you created into two categories: Personal data : You can keep this data and will need to backup files before losing access to your account. University data : You will need to transfer ownership of this data to designated faculty/staff or to another University account. Step 2 : Once you organize your data, your next step will be to either backup or transfer ownership of that data: Backup personal data Transfer ownership of University data Microsoft 365 - Email and Calendar: No further action is required because you will continue to have access to these services. - Web and Desktop Apps: Microsoft 365 - Backup OneDrive for Business data* Microsoft 365 - Preserving organizational data due to a position change or retirement Google UW-Madison G Suite - Backing up data (Optional) - No further action is required because you will continue to have access to this service. UW-Madison G Suite - Transfer folders and files from My Drive to Team Drives UW-Madison G Suite - Transfer G Suite data to another UW-Madison G Suite account Zoom If applicable, download cloud recordings and/or export past meeting information . If applicable, share cloud recordings and/or past meeting information with current UW-Madison colleagues. Box UW-Madison Box - Backup your data (Optional) - No further action is required because you will continue to have access to this service. Box - Transferring Folder Ownership Qualtrics Qualtrics Survey Hosting - Backup your data (Optional) - No further action is required because you will continue to have access to this service. Qualtrics Survey Hosting - Transfer ownership of your survey Important Note: Once your appointment changes, your access to OneDrive and your license for the Outlook desktop client will expire 90 days after the change.
